cv.debug_note: fold_details contains train/test patients, selected features, fold coefficients and patient-level predicted probabilities. Feature selection is performed inside each training fold.

sample_size_design.interpretation: Use Monte Carlo as the empirical performance estimate and these guardrails as methodological constraints on event-rate precision, overfitting and the maximum number of final predictors.

candidate_models.purpose: Compare bootstrap-stable fixed-size models, the primary selector, and univariate/penalized feature-selection strategies.
candidate_models.important_caution: Bootstrap-stable and 1-feature models are preferred for interpretability. Selector-comparison models are sensitivity analyses because their top-k set is ranked on the current full run.

models.label: 1 feature - top bootstrap-stable
models.description: Modello compatto costruito dalle feature più stabili al bootstrap. Se non disponibili, usa fallback dalla selezione primaria.

model_explanation.important_note: The saved final model is trained on all available patients. Its apparent training AUC is optimistic. Use Nested CV, LOOCV and permutation test as validation metrics.
